title: Unlock the Full Power of zCorvus
subtitle: Access thousands of premium icons and get your npm token for unlimited use

highlights.instant: Guided checkout and consistent return flows without losing your visual state.
highlights.token: Your premium access turns into an npm token ready for real project use.
highlights.support: Plans built to scale from solo workflows to team distribution.

pro.name: Pro Plan
pro.summary: Best for unlocking the premium collection and shipping it into active projects quickly.

enterprise.name: Enterprise Plan
enterprise.summary: For teams that need priority support, shared licensing, and custom icon work.

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.subtitle: Welcome to zCorvus Premium
success.npmInstructions: Use this token to access zCorvus premium packages in your projects.
success.fullAccessMessage: You now have full access to all premium icons!
success.tokenNotReady: Your token is being generated. You'll receive an email with instructions.
success.tokenNotFound: Failed to generate token. Please contact support.
success.contactSupport: If the problem persists, contact support
success.generatingMessage: The token is being generated. This may take a few seconds.
success.setupTitle: How to set up your token:
success.option1: Option 1: Click on "Download .npmrc" and place the file in your project root
success.option2: Option 2: Manually create a .npmrc file in your project root with this content:

checkpoints.ready: Preparing immediate access to the collection

steps.createNpmrc: Create a .npmrc file in your project root
steps.addToken: Add your token to the file: //registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=YOUR_TOKEN

cancel.title: Payment Cancelled
cancel.subtitle: No charge was made. You can try again when you're ready.

errors.checkoutFailed: Error creating payment session. Please try again.
errors.storageBlocked: Could not verify your session. Please make sure cookies are enabled in your browser and try again.
